                "childAction": "",

                "created": "2023-07-12T17:50:38.229+02:00",
                "descr": "LLDP neighbor is bridge and its port vlan 1 mismatches with the local port vlan Unspecified. If neighbor is running MST(802.1s) protocol, this could result in a layer2 topology with a loop",
                "dn": "subj-[topology/pod-1/node-205/sys/lldp/inst/if-[eth1/1]/adj-1]/rec-8598979363",
                "id": "8598979363",

                "interface_id": "eth1/1",
                "descrT": [
                    "LLDP neighbor is bridge and its port ",
                    "vlan 1 mismatches with the local port ",
                    "vlan Unspecified. If neighbor is ",
                    "running MST(802.1s) protocol, this ",
                    "could result in a layer2 topology with ",
                    "a loop"
                ],
                "dnT": [
                    "subj-[topology/pod-1/node-205/sys/lldp/",
                    "inst/if-[eth1/1]/adj-1]/rec-8598979363"
                ],

                    "vlan 1 mismatches with the local port ",
                    "vlan 419. If neighbor is running ",
                    "MST(802.1s) protocol, this could result ",
                    "in a layer2 topology with a loop"
